scripts.postinstall:
echo '!!!!!!!! >>>> DO NOT USE THIS SOFTWARE <<<< !!!!!!!! 
Concorde ended maintenance on November 9, 2025, and extended security updates were discontinued on December 31, 2025. Going forward, security updates will no longer be provided for any vulnerabilities. Administrators operating instances are requested to take the time to switch to a different implementation.' && node scripts/install-packages.mjs
scripts.build:
echo '!!!!!!!! >>>> DO NOT USE THIS SOFTWARE <<<< !!!!!!!! 
Concorde ended maintenance on November 9, 2025, and extended security updates were discontinued on December 31, 2025. Going forward, security updates will no longer be provided for any vulnerabilities. Administrators operating instances are requested to take the time to switch to a different implementation.' && node scripts/build.mjs
scripts.start:
echo '!!!!!!!! >>>> DO NOT USE THIS SOFTWARE <<<< !!!!!!!! 
Concorde ended maintenance on November 9, 2025, and extended security updates were discontinued on December 31, 2025. Going forward, security updates will no longer be provided for any vulnerabilities. Administrators operating instances are requested to take the time to switch to a different implementation.' && cd packages/backend && node --experimental-json-modules ./built/index.js
scripts.migrate:
echo '!!!!!!!! >>>> DO NOT USE THIS SOFTWARE <<<< !!!!!!!! 
Concorde ended maintenance on November 9, 2025, and extended security updates were discontinued on December 31, 2025. Going forward, security updates will no longer be provided for any vulnerabilities. Administrators operating instances are requested to take the time to switch to a different implementation.' && cd packages/backend && npx typeorm migration:run -d ormconfig.js
scripts.docker:start:
echo '!!!!!!!! >>>> DO NOT USE THIS SOFTWARE <<<< !!!!!!!! 
Concorde ended maintenance on November 9, 2025, and extended security updates were discontinued on December 31, 2025. Going forward, security updates will no longer be provided for any vulnerabilities. Administrators operating instances are requested to take the time to switch to a different implementation.' && npm run migrate && cd packages/backend && node --experimental-json-modules ./built/index.js
scripts.mocha: cd packages/backend && cross-env NODE_ENV=test TS_NODE_FILES=true TS_NODE_TRANSPILE_ONLY=true TS_NODE_PROJECT="./test/tsconfig.json" npx mocha
